rewritten_requirements: The system shall provide a personalized profile for each user.
The system shall allow users to personalize their account and change their password.
The system shall enable clients to post project requests with requirements for BPO organizations.
The system shall allow BPO organizations to search and respond to client project requests.
The system shall enable the transfer of documents required by BPO organizations through the system.
The system shall provide progress updates to clients on work being done.
The system shall allow clients to check their product and quote modifications.
The system shall enable BPO organizations to upload their products/services for further procedure.
The system shall facilitate payment from clients to BPO organizations at the end of agreements.
The system shall enable the shipment of products/services to clients.
The system shall allow clients to rate the service provided by BPO organizations.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide a personalized profile for each user
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Login – provides a personalized profile for each user, to ensure security.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow users to personalize their account and change their password
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Profile changes – each user can personalize their account, and change their password.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable clients to post project requests with requirements for BPO organizations
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Post project request – clients post their request with requirements for BPO organizations to choose from.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow BPO organizations to search and respond to client project requests
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Search project requests – BPO organizations can search and respond to the requests.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable transfer of documents required by BPO organizations through the system
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Upload source documents – the documents required by the BPO organization can be transferred through the system, and the receiver can download them.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide progress updates to clients on work being done
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Check progress – clients should be constantly updated with the progress of the work.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow clients to check their product and quote modifications
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Quality check and testing – the clients can check their product and quote any modifications.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable BPO organizations to upload their products/services for further procedure
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Upload product/service – BPO organization should upload their product/service for the further procedure (payment, shipment, etc.).

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Facilitate payment from clients to BPO organizations at the end of agreements
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Payment – clients should pay the BPO organization at the end of their agreement.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable shipment of products/services to clients
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Shipment – the product/service should be delivered to the clients.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow clients to rate the service provided by BPO organizations
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Rating – the clients can rate the service provided by the BPO organization
